consistency.name_vs_slug: Consistent. 'Mace of Disruption' matches the standard naming convention derived from the slug.
consistency.type_consistency: Type 'Weapon (mace)' is consistent with the item's name and function.

quality.completeness: The description is detailed, covering offensive effects, conditional destruction, the saving throw DC, and light emission properties.
quality.clarity: The mechanics are clearly stated. The conditional destruction threshold (25 HP or fewer) and the secondary effect (frightened condition) are unambiguous.

mechanics.damage_bonus: 2d6 radiant damage against Fiends or Undead.
mechanics.conditional_destruction: If the target has <= 25 HP after damage calculation, a DC 15 Wisdom save is triggered.
mechanics.save_consequence_success: Target becomes frightened of the wielder until the end of the wielder's next turn.
mechanics.utility_effects: Sheds bright light (20 ft radius) and dim light (additional 20 ft) while held.

analysis.archival_notes: This item provides significant anti-fiend/undead utility, combining burst damage, instant removal potential, and control/debuff effects (frightened). The light source utility is a useful passive benefit.
